title: Purple Antibacterial Wound Spray 100ml - Animal Gentian Violet Aqueous Solution Effective Antiseptic Antifungle for Cuts, Scrapes Non-Sting For Horses and Animals
features: 🟣 Gentian Violet: 0.25% solution for effective antiseptic care
🌿 Safer Formula: Gentle on skin yet powerful
🩹 Fast Healing: Protects and speeds up recovery
🧼 Easy to Use: Spray on affected area, let it work
🐾 For Animal Use: Ideal for pets and livestock
description: Product Description The Ultimate Skin & Wound Cleanser for Animals Our Gentian Violet Spray is an essential tool for maintaining the health and well-being of your animals. Formulated with a 0.25% concentration of gentian violet , this versatile solution is ideal for wound care , skin care , and preventing infections in animals of all kinds. Wound Care & Skin Cleansing Gentle Cleansing Power With a 0.25% concentration of gentian violet, this spray helps maintain skin cleanliness without harsh ingredients. Soothing and Refreshing Leaves skin feeling clean and comfortable without irritation. Quick and Easy Designed for simple use, making it a reliable addition to your skincare routine at home or on the go. Topical Application Safe for topical use, designed to support daily skin hygiene needs. Key Features & Benefits: Effective Wound Care : Gentian violet’s natural antiseptic and antifungal properties make it perfect for treating minor cuts, abrasions, and skin infections . It helps cleanse and protect wounds, supporting faster healing. Supports Healthy Skin : This gentle yet powerful solution can be used to manage skin conditions, reduce irritation, and promote overall skin health . Ideal for treating chafing , scalding , and minor irritations . Safe for Animals : Specially designed for use on animals, our Gentian Violet Spray is suitable for animals, ensuring their skin remains healthy and free from infections. (We do not recommend for use on cats). Quick & Easy Application : The convenient spray format ensures that the solution can be applied directly to the affected area with minimal mess. The fast-drying formula ensures minimal disruption to your pet’s activities. Trusted for Generations : G entian violet is a well-established solution known for its efficacy in animal wound care . The Power of Purple Gentian Violet is a trusted solution for supporting skin health and wound care in animals. Its natural antiseptic and antifungal properties help prevent infections and promote healing of minor wounds , abrasions , and skin irritation . This 0.25% gentian violet spray is gentle yet effective, making it ideal for skin care routines. Effective and Gentle : Cleanses without harsh chemicals, suitable for sensitive skin . Proven Protection : Trusted for decades in pet wound care to fight infections . Quick & Convenient : Easy-to-use spray for on-the-go care, promoting fast healing . Supports Skin Health : Ideal for abrasions , chafing , and skin discomfort . Why arlo?
